allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; d = json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\([{ 'code': x['code'], 'category': x.get\('category'\)} for x in d['definitions']]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; d = json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('count:', len\(d.get\('timings',[]\)\)\); print\('codes:', set\(t['definitionCode'] for t in d.get\('timings',[]\)[:50]\)\)")
